/home/runner/work/libvdpau-va-gl/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libvdpau_va_gl.so.1 -o ../libvdpau_va_gl.so.1 "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-bitmap-surface.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-csc-matrix.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-device.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-output-surface.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-presentation-queue.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-decoder.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-mixer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/api-video-surface.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/entry.c.o CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/trace.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/reverse-constant.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/handle-storage.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/bitstream.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/h264-parse.c.o" CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/watermark.c.o "CMakeFiles/vdpau_va_gl_obj.dir/ctx-stack.c.o"  -lX11 -lglib-2.0 -lva-x11 -lva -lswscale -lGL -lGLU -lpthread -lrt ../glsl/libshader-bundle.a
